title: Sum of path XORs over all node pairs in a tree (root-prefix XOR + per-bit counting)
source: Sum over all unordered node pairs of the path-XOR in a tree. Intended solution uses the root-to-node prefix-XOR identity pathxor(a,b)=xr[a]^xr[b] plus per-bit cross-pair counting (O(n log V)); an all-pairs enumeration is O(n^2) and times out. Grader ground truth: an independent O(n^2) all-pairs BFS brute force on small trees.
